ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: I dolori della partenza dalla patria
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Discorso academico di Francesco Carmeni Il Sollevato. Recitato da lui nell`Accademia de Gelati e dedicato all`Illustrissimo Sig. Gio[vanni] Vincenzo Imperiali L`Attempato. Nel principato dell`illustrissimo Signor Conte Carlo Antonio Fibbia L` Impatiente.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The author informs us that a debate took place in the Gelati Academy on whether it was more painful for a man having to abandon his beloved woman, or his beloved Patria. In his `discorso` Carmeni argued that leaving one`s Patria is worse than leaving the beloved woman, against the opinion of many academicians.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
